column3: 5100|Deep Void — Entry|ethereal_drift|Below the abyss floor. The living thing you stood on has an underside. It's covered in eyes.|dark|||||
column4: 5101|Deep Void — Tendril Path|ethereal_drift|Organic tendrils form a path through absolute darkness. They pulse with bioluminescence.|dark|||||

column2: 5102|Void Pocket — Memories|ethereal_drift|A bubble of reality containing someone's memories. You can walk through their life.|dark|||||
column3: 5103|Void Pocket — Dreams|ethereal_drift|A bubble of pure dream-stuff. Reality is whatever you imagine. Dangerous.|dark|||||
column4: 5104|Void Pocket — Nightmares|ethereal_drift|A bubble of concentrated fear. Your worst memories given form. Face them or flee.|dark|||||
column5: 5105|Void Pocket — Time|ethereal_drift|A bubble where time flows backward. You see the end before the beginning.|dark|||||

column2: 5106|The Womb of Worlds|ethereal_drift|Where new realities gestate. Proto-universes bubble and pop. Some survive.|dark|||||
column3: 5107|The Dead God's Corpse — Head|ethereal_drift|You're standing on something that was once divine. Its skull is a continent.|dark|||||
column4: 5108|The Dead God's Corpse — Heart|ethereal_drift|The heart still beats. Once per century. The next beat is soon.|dark|||||
column5: 5109|The Dead God's Corpse — Hand|ethereal_drift|A hand the size of a mountain, fingers curled. Something is clutched in the fist.|dark|||||

column2: 5110|Primordial Ocean|ethereal_drift|An ocean of liquid potential. Before matter, before energy, there was this.|dark|||||
column3: 5111|The First Light|ethereal_drift|A single point of light in infinite darkness. The first photon ever created. Still shining.|dark|||||
column4: 5112|The Last Thought|ethereal_drift|The final thought of the dead god. It echoes eternally. It sounds like a question.|dark|||||
column5: 5113|The Seed|ethereal_drift|A seed of pure creation. Plant it anywhere and a new world grows. Handle with care.|dark|||||

column3: 5114|The Edge of Everything|ethereal_drift|Beyond this, nothing exists. Not void. Not darkness. Not even the concept of 'beyond.'|dark|||||
column4: 5115|The Mirror of Worlds|ethereal_drift|A surface that shows other realities. Some are similar. Some are horrifying. One is watching back.|dark|||||
